'''鈭歯g-r-sh''' ('''kangarash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lomilomi|lomilomi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lomilomi|lomilomi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangarash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingarash|thingarash]] || [[word:jingarash|jingarash]] || [[word:shingarash|shingarash]] || [[word:kingarash|kingarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungarash|thuthungarash]] || [[word:jujungarash|jujungarash]] || [[word:shushungarash|shushungarash]] || [[word:kukungarash|kukungarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungarash|thungarash]] || [[word:jungarash|jungarash]] || [[word:shungarash|shungarash]] || [[word:kungarash|kungarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungarash|thungarash]] || [[word:jungarash|jungarash]] || [[word:shungarash|shungarash]] || [[word:kungarash|kungarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengarash|thengarash]] || [[word:jengarash|jengarash]] || [[word:shengarash|shengarash]] || [[word:kengarash|kengarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongarash|thothongarash]] || [[word:jojongarash|jojongarash]] || [[word:shoshongarash|shoshongarash]] || [[word:kokongarash|kokongarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongarash|thongarash]] || [[word:jongarash|jongarash]] || [[word:shongarash|shongarash]] || [[word:kongarash|kongarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongarash|thongarash]] || [[word:jongarash|jongarash]] || [[word:shongarash|shongarash]] || [[word:kongarash|kongarash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]] || [[word:ngarash|ngarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngarash|th忙ngarash]] || [[word:j忙ngarash|j忙ngarash]] || [[word:sh忙ngarash|sh忙ngarash]] || [[word:k忙ngarash|k忙ngarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangarash|thathangarash]] || [[word:jajangarash|jajangarash]] || [[word:shashangarash|shashangarash]] || [[word:kakangarash|kakangarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangarash|thangarash]] || [[word:jangarash|jangarash]] || [[word:shangarash|shangarash]] || [[word:kangarash|kangarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangarash|thangarash]] || [[word:jangarash|jangarash]] || [[word:shangarash|shangarash]] || [[word:kangarash|kangarash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangarash|shangarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangarash|goshangarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangarash|gokishangarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangarashn眉|shangarashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangarashnkn眉|goshangarashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarashn眉|gokishangarashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangarashsh毛|shangarashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangarashnksh毛|goshangarashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangarashsh毛|gokishangarashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarashro|shangarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarashnkro|goshangarashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarashro|gokishangarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarashmu|shangarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarashnkmu|goshangarashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarashmu|gokishangarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangarashsher|shangarashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangarashnksher|goshangarashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangarashsher|gokishangarashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangarashng|shangarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangarashnkng|goshangarashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangarashng|gokishangarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangarashya|shangarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangarashnkya|goshangarashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangarashya|gokishangarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangarashyam|shangarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangarashnkyam|goshangarashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangarashyam|gokishangarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarashn眉sh毛|shangarashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarashnkn眉sh毛|goshangarashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarashn眉sh毛|gokishangarashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarashn眉ro|shangarashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarashnkn眉ro|goshangarashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarashn眉ro|gokishangarashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarashn眉mu|shangarashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarashnkn眉mu|goshangarashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarashn眉mu|gokishangarashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarashsh毛n眉|shangarashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarashnksh毛n眉|goshangarashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarashsh毛n眉|gokishangarashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarashsh毛ro|shangarashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarashnksh毛ro|goshangarashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarashsh毛ro|gokishangarashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarashsh毛mu|shangarashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarashnksh毛mu|goshangarashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarashsh毛mu|gokishangarashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarashron眉|shangarashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarashnkron眉|goshangarashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarashron眉|gokishangarashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarashrosh毛|shangarashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarashnkrosh毛|goshangarashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarashrosh毛|gokishangarashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarashromu|shangarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarashnkromu|goshangarashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarashromu|gokishangarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarashmun眉|shangarashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarashnkmun眉|goshangarashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarashmun眉|gokishangarashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarashmush毛|shangarashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarashnkmush毛|goshangarashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarashmush毛|gokishangarashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarashmuro|shangarashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarashnkmuro|goshangarashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarashmuro|gokishangarashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
